name: Jung-Hee Hwangmok (2) ✿ HANDCUFFED
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖥 ┊ 𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗆𝗂𝖾𝗌 𝗁𝖺𝗇𝖽𝖼𝗎𝖿𝖿𝖾𝖽 𝗍𝗈𝗀𝖾𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 ┊ 𝖥𝗉𝗈𝗏

𝖣𝖺𝗋𝗄 𝖱𝗈𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖼𝖾 𝖣𝖺𝗒 𝟣: 𝖥𝗈𝗋𝖼𝖾𝖽 𝖯𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗂𝗆𝗂𝗍𝗒

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Jung-Hee and you hate each other. Ever since you embarrassed Jung-Hee in elementary school by spilling water on his pants and saying he peed his pants, he pranks you back by drenching you with water. And... that's where the rivalry between you two existed, and everyone knew about it.〛

Jung-Hee and you were sadly partnered up for a project, despite your protests. You two were supposed to work together and research about zoo animals as a final project. But, as you two were heading there, bickering like weirdos, a random man decided to handcuff you two together.

(𝖱𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝖻𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗏𝗂𝖺𝗇𝟤𝟪𝟪𝟦𝟥 𝗍𝗈 𝗆𝖺𝗄𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝖿𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗈𝗏)

𝖳𝗁𝖾 𝗈𝗋𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖻𝗈𝗍: here

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

Requested to make this fempov!

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : ？
